caribbean.headline: Caribbean Storm Hits Martinique
caribbean.paragraph: Martinique is experiencing 100% rain probability with winds of 12 kt and wave heights of 2.6 ft, while Barbados is seeing less severe conditions with 15 kt winds. I expect the strong weather to continue in Martinique, with the dominant swell direction coming from the SE and a swell period of 6 s, but no significant threats of tropical cyclones or severe thunderstorms are present in the region.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing 21 kt winds with 4.1 ft wave heights and less than 10% rain probability, while Istanbul has 12 kt winds. I expect these conditions to prevail with the dominant swell direction from the west, impacting maritime activities in the Western Mediterranean, particularly around Cadiz.
